title: scleria terrestris var. latior
intro: Scleria terrestris var. latior, also known as broad-leaved Scleria, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Scleria terrestris var. latior include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Scleria terrestris var. latior can be prepared into various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments.
